findings.summary: DefaultRepositoryRuntimeCatalog.listRuns and findRun only query getActiveRuntimes(), which only returns active execution runtimes, silently ignoring run history for inactive or disabled repositories.
findings.suggested_fix: Query all operational runtimes (e.g., using resolveAllOperational or a dedicated factory method) instead of relying solely on the active execution cache.

findings.summary: The wrappedRunRepository in composeRepositoryRuntime overrides `update` to inject configuration fingerprints but fails to override `atomicUpdateByUuid`, causing updates via CAS to silently omit configuration metadata.
findings.suggested_fix: Override `atomicUpdateByUuid` on the wrappedRunRepository to inject `configFingerprint` and `configSourcesJson` identically to `update`.
